epics.title: Foundations & Infrastructure
epics.summary: Stand up the data layer and app shell so feature work can begin.

stories.title: As the team, I want a versioned schema + migrations so every feature has a correct data layer.
acceptance_criteria: Given migrations run on a clean DB, When applied, Then all tables and indexes exist.

stories.title: As the team, I want CI/CD + environments so builds are reproducible.
acceptance_criteria: Given a push to main, When the pipeline runs, Then it lints, tests, and builds.

stories.title: As the system, I want providers wired so any sign-in creates a profile.
acceptance_criteria: Given a new user, When auth succeeds, Then a profile row exists.

stories.title: As a new user, I want clean auth screens so I can sign in fast.
acceptance_criteria: Given a valid session, When the app loads, Then it routes home.

stories.title: As a new user, I want clear auth screens designed so sign-in feels trustworthy.
acceptance_criteria: Given the auth flow, When designed, Then ON-1/ON-2 are speced with states.

stories.title: As the security owner, I want auth hardened so tokens can't be abused.
acceptance_criteria: Given the auth endpoints, When hit repeatedly, Then rate limiting blocks abuse.
